current_focus: GPU-aware dependency installation for Linux venv

progress.description: Switched distribution toward Flash-only runtime dependencies. Linux installer and launcher now strictly use the repository ./venv: install.sh always creates or activates it, and 0.sh requires and activates it with no system-Python fallback. install.sh installs requirements.txt only, creates .env from template when missing, and validates Flash imports. launcher.pyw now installs only requirements.txt into bundled Windows Python. requirements.txt now includes chatterbox-flash, and runtime helpers were moved off src.chatterbox/chatterbox.tts_turbo imports. build/windows/build_linux.sh now stages only runtime files needed by the installer, and build/create_distribution.sh now produces a minimal shareable tar.gz bundle. README installation steps now match the new flow. Windows installer build still needs a host with wine64 to execute end-to-end.
progress.installer_gpu_selection: Dependency dry-run passes for RTX 4060 Ti pre-Blackwell path; full install remains pending.

decisions.cpu_support: Not a target; preserve existing no-GPU branch without additional CPU handling.
decisions.gpu_detection: Use nvidia-smi compute capability; major version >=12 selects Blackwell workaround, older or missing capability selects torch 2.6.0.
decisions.cuda_target: Use torch 2.7.1 and torchaudio 2.7.1 with cu128 index when NVIDIA GPU is detected.
decisions.flash_json_schema: Store num_steps, time_shift_tau, and backend in first _metadata tts_params; store VADER-adjusted exaggeration, cfg_scale, and temperature per chunk.
decisions.microbatching: Removed ineffective ENABLE_MICRO_BATCHING, ENABLE_VADER_MICRO_BATCHING, and ENABLE_BATCH_BINNING controls; retain TTS_BATCH_SIZE for real Flash outer batching and S3Gen scheduling.
decisions.flash_batch_cuda_graphs: Disable CUDA graph capture for Flash batches by default until runtime quality validation passes.
decisions.flash_batch_quality_guard: T3 Batch mode preserves combined-generation quality fallback; Staged T3/S3Gen mode retains T3-only rows, strips special codec IDs, and sends every retained row to scheduled S3Gen.
decisions.legacy_cfg: Read cfg_weight only as compatibility input, normalize it to cfg_scale, and never write cfg_weight.
decisions.installer_portability: Keep install and build scripts repo-relative; avoid machine-specific absolute paths in shipped runtime files and stage config.
decisions.windows_bundle_docs: Include README.md and LICENSE in Windows installer output.
decisions.tab8_status_display: Keep Tab 8 status panel as separate widget, but match Tab 1 title and route JSON-generation structured status signals to Tab 8.
decisions.flash_runtime_only: Use chatterbox-flash for runtime imports and keep old Turbo helper imports out of install-time dependency checks.
decisions.launcher_env_probe: 0.sh now uses the repo venv created by install.sh instead of probing multiple env paths.
decisions.venv_contract: Installer and launcher should both use ./venv as the single Linux environment path.
decisions.gpu_install_strategy: Blackwell uses torch 2.7.1+cu128 and installs chatterbox-tts/chatterbox-flash with --no-deps; older GPUs and CPU use torch 2.6.0.

next_tasks: Run install.sh in clean environment with dependency access and confirm runtime imports pass
Verify Blackwell branch on RTX 50-series host or mocked nvidia-smi output
Run build/create_distribution.sh and inspect resulting tar.gz contents
Run build/windows/build_linux.sh on a host with wine64 and confirm installer.exe is produced
Keep future work on master tracking origin/main
open_questions: Whether Flash s3gen.safetensors and Turbo s3gen_meanflow.safetensors contain identical weights is unresolved because no local checkpoint files were present
Whether the user's Pipeline 4 refers to an external/uncommitted design is unresolved; no literal Pipeline 4 symbol exists in the inspected Turbo tree
Flash batching controls were removed because they did not control real Flash T3 or S3Gen batching.
Current S3Gen public API remains batch-size-one; T3-to-S3Gen queue separation is independently feasible using token rows and retained conditionals.
Windows installer rebuild still needs a host with wine64 on PATH or the system fallback path.
Windows RTX 5070 runtime smoke test unavailable because target hardware is not available.
notes: Remote origin is https://github.com/danneauxs/DNXS-Spokenword-Chatterbox-Flash-TTS.git. Existing build/windows/output artifact was not rebuilt after source changes. Active validation used project .venv with RTX 4060 Ti, Torch 2.7.1+cu128, and cached Flash weights. requirements.txt explicitly includes PyQt5>=5.15.0 and PyQt5-sip>=12.0.0. At 2026-07-23 verification, no ./venv directory existed in this checkout; the reported launcher output must predate the current strict launcher or come from another checkout. DocDNA incremental sync required after source edit; docdna-query command was unavailable in current shell, so SQLite fallback was used. Source files changed this session now include install.sh, launcher.pyw, build/create_distribution.sh, build/windows/build_linux.sh, README.md, requirements.txt, interface.py, chatterbox_gui.py, tools/bench_tts.py, tools/generate_from_json.py, utils/generate_from_json.py, plus prior files ASR/asr_config.json, ToolsTest/token_file_to_flash_s3gen.py, config/config.py.
